summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified - Client dashboard no longer shows blank page after therapist completes case history. Consent template now has 12 professional sections with therapist name and credentials. All backend and frontend tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Consent template in /app/backend/routes/clinical.py lines 355-427 now has 12 professional sections. Client Divya Sharma can login, view consent page with all sections, sign consent, and access full dashboard.

client_login.notes: Client login with mobile 8299683186 works correctly

consent_12_sections.notes: All 12 sections present: Services Offered, Purpose of Therapy, Nature of Therapy, Role of the Therapist, Confidentiality, Records & Documentation, Fees & Payments, Appointments & Attendance, Use of Digital Systems, Client Responsibilities, Right to Withdraw, Consent Statement

therapist_name_display.notes: Dr. Kavita Dhingra displayed in consent page and dashboard

consent_signing.notes: Consent signs successfully with digital signature method

dashboard_after_consent.notes: Dashboard shows greeting, therapist name, appointments, homework, assessments, payments sections

p0_bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Client dashboard showing blank page after therapist completed case history
p0_bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Consent template was missing or incomplete
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated consent template in clinical.py with comprehensive 12-section professional informed consent form
p0_bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - Client dashboard now loads correctly with all sections visible
